title: Circular No. 1062/01/2018-CX
text: 23 Jan 2018 17:06 HP Fax : page 1 23 Jan 18 17:14 CiRCLAANo - E..No, 296/29/2018-CX.9 log wer/rarg- Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue : Central Board of Excise & Customs. 267 D, North Block, New Dethi, Dated 23rd January, 2018 CIRCULAR Sub; Celebration of Customs Day and Investiture Ceremony-2018-reg, The Customs Day and investiture Ceremony, 2018 is being celebrated on 27% January, 2018 at Plenary Hall, Vigyan Bhawan, New Delhi. All ‘Group-A’ officers posted in Board are directed to attend the Customs Day and Investiture Ceremony- 2018. : 2. This issues with the approval of Chairman (CBEC), \ va 4 eonelialoors (¥. Ganesh Kumar)Under Secretary to the Gavt. of India Tel: 2309 2413 €- mail: kumar.vg@nic.in To, : All IRS (C&CE) officers, posted In Board, Copy to Webmaster, CBEC, with the request to upload the letter on website, p.1 ox -- 1 of 1 --
